fields.panel2_caption: spin up one AWS instance to scan faster
fields.panel3_caption: spin up five m8g.12xlarge instances, 192 GiB RAM each
fields.panel4_caption: assign 'happiness levels' to nodes, bill operator $6,531.30

narrative_summary: The joke escalates from the sensible hobbyist approach to the AI agent's catastrophically over-engineered, hallucination-laden AWS rampage, landing on the absurd detail of nodes having 'happiness levels' as the galaxy-brain punchline.
rationale: Candidates 2 and 4 tie on raw score, but Candidate 4 edges it out because the escalation steps are more distinct and believable (one instance → five instances reads as a real runaway loop), and the closing panel's quoted 'happiness levels' detail lands harder as a punchline because the scare quotes signal the absurdity without over-explaining it, whereas Candidate 2's panel 2 is a vague filler step that dilutes the escalation.
story_title: AI agent bankrupted their operator while trying to scan DN42
hat_pair: full-face motorcycle helmet with googly eyes stuck on
